Notice Of Motion And Motion To Conduct An Ime Of Pltf Marissa Watters
Off Calendar Jul-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Mark G. Intrieri, Esq., appearing for Defendant & moving party: David Espino
Kevin T. Barnes, Esq. appearing (telephonic appearance) for plaintiff & opposing party: Marissa A. Watters

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants David Espino, San Francisco Automotive Parts Warehouse's Motion To Conduct An IME Of Plaintiff is denied. The matter has already been ruled upon. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2007 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-24-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Marissa A. Watters' Motion To Compel Response To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is denied as it seeks the entire personnel file. The motion is denied as it seeks the following documents: employment eligibility verification; I.D. employment; hiring information; W-4; W-5; copy of Social Security card and Driver's License; application for employment; and pre-employment evaluation.
The following documents shall be produced for in camera review for relevance: driver's alert incident calls dated July 29, 2005 and August 22, 2005; suspension dated August 9, 2005; warning dated August 9, 2005; job duties dated July 27, 2005; warning dated July 13, 2005; Espino dated July 13, 2005; disciplinary action dated July 1, 2005; form/policies received dated May 11, 2005; and motor vehicle record request dated May 2, 2005.
Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
